description_long: This is a single-story suburban house set on a rectangular grassy lot, featuring a prominent attached garage and a paved driveway leading to the street. The house has a light tan exterior with a dark gray gable roof and a brick chimney. A covered front porch with white columns and a small overhang marks the main entrance, while the garage is seamlessly integrated into the structure. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with several on the front and sides, providing ample natural light. A wooden fence runs along the rear and side of the property, enclosing part of the yard. The landscaping is minimal, with the house and driveway dominating the lot.
description: A single-story tan house with a dark gable roof, attached garage, covered porch, and a fenced grassy yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a covered porch, attached garage, and driveway leading to the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, garage, and the driveway extending to the road.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, fenced yard, and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the chimney, side windows, and the fence running along the property.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with white columns, small overhang, and a single front door
